form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Run Blaze Run at this track over 2000m in a 3yo+ on March 31 at $13.20. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.4 m finishing second behind Upton at this track over 2000m in a 3yo+ on April 7. Tricky draw but with even luck can give a good account.
